hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.kt|*.kts) ./gradlew.bat spotlessApply "-PspotlessIdeHook=$f" --quiet >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; if ! out=$(./gradlew.bat detektFile "-PdetektFile=$f" 2>&1); then { echo 'detekt findings (fix them):';echo "$out" | grep -E ':[0-9]+:[0-9]+: .* \[[A-Za-z]+\]' || echo "$out" | tail -20; } >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac
hooks.statusMessage: Formatting with Spotless and checking with detekt...
